<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Insights; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; class Basic implements ArrayHydrateInterface { protected array $data = []; public function __construct(string $number) { $this->data['national_format_number'] = $number; } public function getRequestId(): string { return $this->data['request_id']; } public function getNationalFormatNumber(): string { return $this->data['national_format_number']; } public function getInternationalFormatNumber(): string { return $this->data['international_format_number']; } public function getCountryCode(): string { return $this->data['country_code']; } public function getCountryCodeISO3(): string { return $this->data['country_code_iso3']; } public function getCountryName(): string { return $this->data['country_name']; } public function getCountryPrefix(): string { return $this->data['country_prefix']; } public function fromArray(array $data): void { $this->data = $data; } public function toArray(): array { return $this->data; } }
